title: pleurogyne
intro: Pleurogyne is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pleurogyne include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Pleurogyne can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
